app.title: Bitmap and tilemap generation from a single example
app.author: futurecat
app.description: Generate bitmaps and tilemaps from a single example
proposed_tests: Install WaveFunctionCollapse and test generating a sample bitmap
Compare performance of WFC vs manual generation methods
Test WFC's ability to generate complex tilemaps
